sections.section_job: Lead with the line that melts a parent: before you were even born, God loved you first.
sections.voice_anchor: Real, unforced warmth. Lowercase tenderness of the verbatim line is the whole vibe — do not punch it up.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not turn this hero into a peppy kids-ministry pitch. No exclamation points, no 'fun-filled,' no forced enthusiasm.

sections.section_job: Reassure parents: stories, songs, play, generous love — plus a Parents Room where you can breathe.
sections.voice_anchor: Let delight show up in the details. Do not force enthusiasm. Kids are loud in the lobby and welcome to be.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not promise polish or performance. No 'state-of-the-art,' no 'world-class.' Solidarity, not salesmanship.

sections.section_job: Logistics woven warmly: ages 0-4, Saturdays 9:15, Teacher Donna coordinating.
sections.voice_anchor: Logistics are content. Plain, specific, parent-friendly. Teacher Donna is a person, not a title.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not list times like a bulletin board. Do not bury Donna's name in a footer.

sections.section_job: Invite: join us at 9:15, then stay for the 10:00 gathering together.
sections.voice_anchor: Warm, plain invitation. 'Come as you are.' No pressure.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: No 'don't miss out.' No countdown urgency. This is an open door, not a sales pitch.

sections.section_job: Close on solidarity: we are all in this mystery of parenting together.
sections.voice_anchor: Real, unforced warmth. Solidarity over sentiment. Doubt is welcome here.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not moralize parenting. No 'raise the next generation of leaders.' This is companionship, not commissioning.

unresolved_inputs.what: Logistics facts (service_time 631e87bd, program e3a0634e, staff 1ac6eab1, ministry b6dc9d7d) were allocated to section 2 but are not in the atoms inventory available to outline-page; drafter must pull from facts_for_page directly when composing body + items.
Section 3 (cta_simple) needs the Saturday 9:15 / 10:00 rhythm from service_time fact 631e87bd-8366-45f1-9e69-70a595d6284d to anchor the invite body; fact is not bindable as an atom_ref here.
Parents Room reassurance language referenced in section_intent has no dedicated atom; drafter should weave it into section 1 body from the section_job directive.
